ability: 每个夜晚，你会得知你的“漫游”标记所在玩家的角色。 [Wandering]
firstNightReminder: Learns the roll of the player their *WANDERING* token is on. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: Learns the roll of the player their *WANDERING* token is on. :reminder:
flavor: but a grin without a cat! It’s the most curious thing I ever saw in all my life!
